visualGoal: Make a Star Citizen / Elite / X4 pilot want the VKB Gladiator HOSAS pair before they hit the stock-and-setup-tax caveats. Real controller product proof throughout — sticks, bases, grip, mount, macro panel; no procedural art. Two headline picks (WinWing, Turtle Beach) are honestly text-only until real photos land.

realProductPhotosNeeded.notes: Best-value pick, currently text-only in body because no verified image. Needs a real product photo (confirm Space/twist variant, not Fighter) before it can appear as a gearpick/shotgrid or before certification. Highest-priority gap — it's the #2 headline pick.

Best-for-Xbox pick, text-only in body. NOTE: the flight bay has a verified /images/gear/flight/turtle-beach-velocityone-flight-stick.jpg but the space-bay path is NOT in the verified set — source a real space-bay photo (or promote/copy+verify the flight-bay one) before it becomes a body visual.
Premium grip that tops the WarBRD-D base; text-only. The WarBRD-D base IS verified and carries the Virpil visual anchor, so this is lower priority than the WinWing/Turtle Beach gaps.

editorialCompositePrompts.prompt: Realistic desktop space-sim battlestation at deep blue and violet nebula rim light, a clamp-mounted twin-stick HOSAS setup on a rigid desk edge with two empty mounting points left open for real joystick product overlays, cable management visible, a monitor glowing with a cockpit HUD out of focus, no fake branded hardware, no fake UI text, 16:9 editorial cover.
editorialCompositePrompts.negativePrompt: fake logos, fake joystick, warped grips, impossible ergonomics, tiny unreadable text, procedural gradient art, sci-fi weaponry

infographicPrompts.title: The space controller buy ladder
content: Best overall - VKB Gladiator NXT EVO ~$139/ea
Best value - WinWing Ursa Minor Space ~$110/ea
Best premium - VKB Gunfighter Mk.IV ~$289 base + grip
Best for Xbox - Turtle Beach VelocityOne ~$130
infographicPrompts.style: IgnitionSim command-center chart, large readable text, deep-space blue/violet palette, real stick photos as row markers for Codex overlay

infographicPrompts.title: Why two sticks: 6 of 6 analog axes
content: Lateral strafe - left stick X (analog, HOSAS only)
Vertical strafe - left stick twist (analog, HOSAS only)
HOTAS reaches 4 of 6 analog; HOSAS reaches 6 of 6
infographicPrompts.style: Numbered axis diagram, ship silhouette with labeled translation/rotation arrows, product-photo placeholders for Codex overlays

curatorScenePrompts.prompt: Realistic adult space-sim curator Val Chen at a clean desktop cockpit bay, one hand resting on a clamp-mounted left-hand joystick, calm expert energy, product overlay space beside the sticks, practical not fantasy, 4:5 portrait, deep-space rim light.

screenshotsOrGameMediaNeeded.need: Optional: a Star Citizen or Elite Dangerous cockpit HUD screenshot to illustrate the 6DOF strafe advantage in the 'Match the config to your game' section.
screenshotsOrGameMediaNeeded.notes: Use official press/media or clearly-licensed capture only; not required for certification.

openQuestions: Source verified in-house photos for WinWing Ursa Minor Space and Turtle Beach VelocityOne — both are headline picks currently text-only.

Confirm exact current Thrustmaster T.16000M US price (kept ~$80 approximate).
